TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1945 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Abdelmadjid Tebboune , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Algeria anini i ci Abdelmadjid Tebboune, patirengan a romi'ad i 2019 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 19 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺma…¨~…ģji…¨~…ģ t…ôb~b~vb~b~vo~uo~u~un…ô , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u a…ĺ*…ôria anini i ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺma…¨~…ģji…¨~…ģ t…ôb~b~vb~b~vo~uo~u~un…ô, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1945 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Abdelmadjid Tebboune , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Algeria anini i ci Abdelmadjid Tebboune, patirengan a romi'ad i 2019 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 19 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺma…¨~…ģji…¨~…ģ t…ôb~b~vb~b~vo~uo~u~un…ô , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u a…ĺ*…ôria anini i ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺma…¨~…ģji…¨~…ģ t…ôb~b~vb~b~vo~uo~u~un…ô, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
